news.title: Here’s Why Wall Street is Bullish on Flex Ltd. (FLEX)
news.summary: ​Flex Ltd. (NASDAQ:FLEX) is one of the High-Flying Tech Stocks to Buy. Wall Street has a positive outlook on the stock. Recently, on January 14, Melissa Fairbanks from Raymond James upgraded the stock from Hold to Buy with a $75 price target. Earlier on January 13, Tim Long from Barclays reiterated a Buy rating on […]

news.title: Flex: Less Cheap, Still Delivering Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
news.summary: Flex remains attractively valued versus peers, despite a 179% return since January 2024 and a strong operational shift. Click here to read an analysis of FLEX stock now.

news.title: Flex Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Call Date
news.summary: Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) will announce its third quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, Feb. 4, 2026. The company will hold a conference call to discuss the results that day at 7:30 AM CT / 8:30 AM ET.

news.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Flex, Lowers Price Target to $71
news.summary: Barclays  analyst George Wang   maintains Flex (NASDAQ:FLEX) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $78 to $71.

news.title: Is Flex (FLEX) Fairly Priced After Strong Multi Year Rally And Recent Pullback
news.summary: If you are wondering whether Flex's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is going to focus squarely on what that value might look like. Flex's stock recently closed at US$63.83, with returns of 4.0% over 7 days, a 5.9% decline over 30 days, 0.2% year to date and 52.3% over 1 year, plus a very large gain over 3 and 5 years that has caught many investors' attention. Recent coverage has highlighted Flex as a key name in electronic manufacturing...

news.title: 3 Reasons FLEX is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
news.summary: Flex currently trades at $64.79 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 245% since January 2021, nearly tripling the S&P 500’s 83.7% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 24.7% thanks to its solid quarterly results.

news.title: CRA, Flex, ePlus, and TD SYNNEX Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
